allow: Bash(git add js/quiz.js play.html css/play.css leaderboard-mobil.html js/leaderboard-mobil.js css/leaderboard-mobil.css && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add replay support, mobile leaderboard, name autocomplete, and finer scoring

- Allow unlimited quiz replays; Firestore score only updated on new high
- Post-quiz results show high-score feedback and "Spill igjen" button
- Name suggestions list loaded from Firestore with localStorage pre-fill
- Scoring penalty reduced from 10→1 pt/sec \(scores: 999, 998, 997…\)
- New mobile leaderboard page with quiz/live tab toggle and team view
- Leaderboard link added to register screen

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add js/quiz.js play.html css/play.css && git status)
